inputs.prompt: Project: The Vinyl Revival — feature documentary about the resurgence of vinyl records. Contains: talking head interviews with record shop owners and musicians, archive footage from 1970s music TV shows, three popular songs played on turntables during filming, photographs from a commercial photo agency, exterior shots at a famous recording studio, branded turntable equipment visible on screen. Distribution: Theatrical + streaming (global), broadcast (UK). Clearances obtained: Talent releases signed for all interviewees.
Project: podcast interview series. Contains: recorded interviews with named guests, background music from a royalty-free library. Distribution: Podcast platforms only.

Project: The Archive — documentary about a shuttered East German film studio. Contains: interviews with former staff, archive footage from the studio's own productions (rights status uncertain post-reunification), a sequence featuring paintings by a deceased East German artist, photographs from the Bundesarchiv, and a scene filmed inside a protected heritage building in Leipzig. Distribution: Arte broadcast, European streaming, festival circuit. Co-production: Germany/France.
